title: El Ordeno
description: elordeno.com zoominfo.com/c/el-ordeño/363579816 El Ordeño (Sociedad Industrial Ganadera El Ordeño S.A.) is an Ecuadorian agro-industrial dairy company founded in 2001, headquartered in Quito, Pichincha Province. It operates an inclusive and associative business model that connects over 6,000 small and medium dairy producers across 100+ collection centers in the Ecuadorian highlands and Amazon. In 2019, it became the first certified B Corporation dairy company in Ecuador, Latin America, and the Caribbean
